plugins.name: wiki-markdown
plugins.description: Markdown-backed AI-native wiki — filesystem-primary decision graph with deterministic CLI, task bridge nodes, integrity checks, and Claude/Codex agent policy scaffolding.

plugins.name: task-github
plugins.description: task-worker 의존 GitHub adapter — Issue Tree projection/import, manual/worker dispatch, PR·merge·Wiki TASK 연계

plugins.name: session-review
plugins.description: Wiki snapshot + git review-branch protocol. 기존 review episode를 재개하고, independence-required edge에만 clean audit context를 사용한다.

plugins.name: studio
plugins.description: 살아있는 에이전트 팀 — track별 native/task-worker/task-github 단일 실행 lease, evidence reuse, delta/full QA gate를 유지한다. session-review와 wiki-markdown은 선택적 도구 레이어다.

plugins.name: task-worker
plugins.description: Provider-neutral WorkGraph, manual/worker dispatch, 병렬 ready-set, 통합 gate, digest-pinned evidence와 세션 간 resume 플러그인
